hooks.command: file="$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT_FILE_PATH"; if [[ "$file" =~ \.(html|css|tsx|jsx|ts|js|svelte|vue)$ ]]; then echo "[router] UI file modified: $file — /impeccable check recommended"; fi
echo "[AGI OS] Session complete. Run /caveman-stats to check token efficiency."

n8n._note: Set N8N_API_URL and N8N_API_KEY env vars, then flip disabled to false

voicenotes._note: Set VOICENOTES_API_KEY env var, then flip disabled to false
